remaining_work.name: Main Orchestrator
remaining_work.description: dea-builder run <workspace> with stage sequencing, skip logic, resumability, cost rollup

validation.full_pipeline_run: Sven (UX Design Lead) — all 6 stages end-to-end

decisions.decision: Pass 5 audit switched to reasoning tier
decisions.rationale: Sven's 101K anchor + 11 knowledge files exceeded general tier's 128K limit (157K tokens)
PAS (always-on) + ChatGPT Custom GPT (copy) + 5 LLM-generated targets

decisions.decision: Hermes and Grok fully independent targets
decisions.rationale: Hermes is a runtime framework, Grok is model-bound — never conflate

decisions.decision: Knowledge manifest (names only) as pipe input, not full content
decisions.rationale: Cost optimization — full knowledge files would add ~100K tokens per target
Future full-stack version sync, not needed now

next_action: Begin Phase 7 — Main Orchestrator: implement dea-builder run <workspace> with stage dependency validation, skip logic, forced re-run, and cost rollup across all stages
